name: Certbot + Cloudflare DNS
description: Set up Let's Encrypt certificates via Cloudflare DNS-01. No inbound ports required.

name: Ubuntu Server Hardening
description: Apply security best practices to a fresh Ubuntu Server install (VM or bare metal).

name: LXC Container Hardening
description: Lightweight hardening for Ubuntu/Debian LXC containers. Skips kernel and firewall changes.

name: BIND9 Local DNS + Forwarder
description: Install and configure BIND9 as a local DNS server with upstream forwarder and split-horizon.

name: Create Proxmox LXC
description: Interactively create a Proxmox LXC container. Must be run on the Proxmox host.

name: Setup Caddy
description: Install and configure Caddy as a reverse proxy and web server.
